name: linMrSchedSetGlobal
title: linMrSchedSetGlobal
syntax: void linMrSchedSetGlobal(unsigned int cycleTime, unsigned int numberOfModes);
description: Configures the basic parameters of the Scheduler.

parameters.name: cycleTime
parameters.description: Frequency with which the Scheduler works through its task lists. With a value of 0 it arranges the working steps directly after one another. Entries are made in milliseconds.
